summary: Fixed 4 mobile scrolling issues: LinkedItemsPane uses list mode on mobile, root layout uses 100dvh, PDF viewport uses dvh on mobile, transcript segments use viewport-relative max-height
how_to_test: 1. Open any media item on a mobile device or Chrome DevTools mobile emulation (≤768px). 2. Switch to Highlights tab — should now scroll through highlights in list mode. 3. Verify the page fits the visible viewport (no content hidden behind address bar). 4. Open a PDF — viewport should adapt when address bar shows/hides. 5. Open a podcast/video — transcript segments should use ~50% of viewport height, not a fixed 320px. 6. Run `npx vitest run --project=unit` — all 139 tests pass.
risks: dvh is not supported in browsers older than Safari 15.4 / Chrome 108 — the 100vh fallback mitigates this
Forcing list mode on mobile means aligned-mode highlight synchronization is lost — but alignment is meaningless when panes are tabbed
